headline: LiquidStack GigaModular™ CDU Platform Is Now Commercially Available with Expanded 14 MW Capacity
summary: GigaModular™ offers flexible capacity, operational resilience and modularity to accelerate high-density AI infrastructure deployments GigaModular 14MW GigaModular 14MW CARROLLTON, Texas, May 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- LiquidStack, a Trane Technologies company and global leader in liquid cooling technologies for data centers, today announced the commercial availability of its GigaModular™ CDU platform. The platform’s modular, pay-as-you-grow architecture, designed to meet NVIDIA Vera Rubin spec

headline: A Look At Trane Technologies (TT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Cooling
summary: Trane Technologies (TT) has been drawing investor attention after its recent share price moves, with the stock closing at US$451.69 and showing mixed performance over the past week, month, and past three months. See our latest analysis for Trane Technologies. Recent trading has cooled slightly, with the 7 day share price return down 4.10% and the 30 day share price return down 5.35%, although the year to date share price return of 13.49% and 3 year total shareholder return of 181.06% still...

headline: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on Trane Technologies Stock?
summary: While Trane Technologies has lagged the broader S&P 500 Index over the past 52 weeks, analysts remain reasonably bullish about the stock’s future performance.
